query:
SELECT id, name, tickers, startDate, endDate, capitalPerTrade,
  status, totalROI, totalProfit, finalWallet, createdAt
FROM labSimulations
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute 
SELECT id, name, tickers, startDate, endDate, capitalPerTrade,
  status, totalROI, totalProfit, finalWallet, createdAt
FROM labSimulations
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
